COMBAT_SPELL_TIMER.Title: Combat Spell Timer
COMBAT_SPELL_TIMER.FeatureAutoExtended: {actor}'s {feature} was extended automatically — owner not logged in.
COMBAT_SPELL_TIMER.RemoveOnDeletePrompt: {name} was removed from combat. Also remove their tracked spell timer(s)?
COMBAT_SPELL_TIMER.InitiativeHint: Leave blank to use combatant's rolled initiative

Rage.ExtendPrompt2014: {name}'s Rage turn just ended. Extend or end it?
Rage.ExtendPrompt2024: {name}'s Rage turn just ended. Extend or end it?
Rage.AlreadyRagingPrompt: {name} is already raging! How many rounds remain?

FormOfTheBeast.Title: Form of the Beast
FormOfTheBeast.Prompt: {name} rages — manifest the bestial power within? Choose a natural weapon to take form until the rage ends.
FormOfTheBeast.BiteDescription: Your mouth transforms into a bestial muzzle or great mandibles. Once on each of your turns when you damage a creature with this bite, you regain hit points equal to your proficiency bonus, provided you have less than half your hit points when you hit.
FormOfTheBeast.ClawsDescription: Each of your hands transforms into a claw, usable as a weapon while it's empty. Once on each of your turns when you attack with a claw using the Attack action, you can make one additional claw attack as part of the same action.
FormOfTheBeast.TailDescription: You grow a lashing, spiny tail with reach. When a creature you can see within 10 feet hits you with an attack roll, you can use your reaction to roll a d8 and add it to your AC against that attack, possibly causing it to miss.

TotemSpirit.BearDescription: While raging, you have resistance to all damage except psychic damage.
TotemSpirit.EagleDescription: While you're raging and aren't wearing heavy armor, other creatures have disadvantage on opportunity attack rolls against you, and you can use the Dash action as a bonus action on your turn.
TotemSpirit.TigerDescription: While raging, you can add 10 feet to your long jump distance and 3 feet to your high jump distance.
TotemSpirit.WolfDescription: While raging, your friends have advantage on melee attack rolls against any creature within 5 feet of you that is hostile to you.

WildSurge.ExplodingSpiritDescription: Until your rage ends, you can use a bonus action on each of your turns to summon another exploding spirit. At the end of the turn it appears, the spirit explodes: each creature within 5 feet of it must succeed on a Dexterity saving throw or take 1d6 force damage.
WildSurge.WildMagicDamageDescription: Until your rage ends, whenever a creature hits you with an attack roll, that creature takes 1d6 force damage as magic lashes out in retribution.
WildSurge.FlowersAndVinesDescription: Flowers and vines temporarily grow around you. Until your rage ends, the ground within 15 feet of you is difficult terrain for your enemies.
WildSurge.BoltOfLightDescription: Until your rage ends, you can use a bonus action on each of your turns to shoot another bolt of light from your chest: a creature of your choice within 30 feet must succeed on a Constitution saving throw or take 1d6 radiant damage and be blinded until the start of your next turn.

Beyond20.SettingHint: Add a "Cast Spell" button to Beyond20 spell chat cards that casts the spell in Foundry and consumes the slot.
Beyond20.AutoCastHint: Automatically cast spells and apply feature effects (e.g. Rage) from Beyond20 cards you trigger, instead of clicking the button. The button is still shown, but disabled.
Beyond20.FeatureNotFound: Combat Spell Timer: couldn't find "{name}" on {actor}. Its name on the character sheet may differ.
Beyond20.SpellNotFound: Combat Spell Timer: couldn't find the D&D Beyond spell "{name}" on {actor}. Its name on the character sheet may differ.
Beyond20.NoActivity: Combat Spell Timer: "{name}" has no usable activity to cast.
Beyond20.NoActor: Combat Spell Timer: couldn't resolve the casting actor for this card.

SpellMap.Title: Beyond20 Spell Name Mappings
SpellMap.MenuHint: Map D&D Beyond spell names to the matching spell names on your Foundry character sheets, for spells the Cast Spell button can't find by name.
SpellMap.Help: Map a D&D Beyond spell name (left) to the spell's name on the Foundry character sheet (right). Matching ignores case. Leave nothing blank; incomplete rows are discarded on save.
